channel.title: Epidemiologic Methods
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Epidemiologic Methods

item.title: A study of a stochastic model and extinction phenomenon of meningitis epidemic
item.description: Article by Erin Clancey, Eric T. Lofgren DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/em-2024-0015

item.title: Understanding the impact of media and latency in information response on the disease propagation: a mathematical model and analysis
item.description: Article by Erin Clancey, Eric T. Lofgren DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/em-2024-0011

item.title: Time-varying reproductive number estimation for practical application in structured populations
item.description: Article by Erin Clancey, Eric T. Lofgren DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/em-2024-0020
